+53,7 @@ {"id":"flywheel_connectors-a81","title":"fcp.stripe - Stripe Payment Platform Connector","description":"# fcp.stripe - Stripe Payment Platform Connector ## Overview Comprehensive Stripe integration for payment processing, subscription management, and financial reporting with enterprise-grade security. ## Archetype **Hybrid: Request-Response + Webhook** - Request-Response: All payment and customer operations - Webhook: Payment events, subscription lifecycle, disputes ## Key Operations ### Payment Operations - `stripe.payment.create` - Create PaymentIntent - `stripe.payment.confirm` - Confirm payment - `stripe.payment.capture` - Capture authorized payment - `stripe.payment.cancel` - Cancel payment - `stripe.payment.refund` - Process refund - `stripe.payment.list` - List payments with filters ### Subscription Operations - `stripe.subscription.create` - Create subscription - `stripe.subscription.update` - Modify subscription - `stripe.subscription.cancel` - Cancel subscription - `stripe.subscription.pause` - Pause collection - `stripe.subscription.resume` - Resume paused subscription - `stripe.subscription.items` - Manage subscription items - `stripe.subscription.schedule` - Schedule future changes ### Customer Operations - `stripe.customer.create` - Create customer - `stripe.customer.update` - Update customer data - `stripe.customer.delete` - Delete customer - `stripe.customer.get` - Retrieve customer - `stripe.customer.list` - List customers - `stripe.customer.payment_methods` - Manage payment methods - `stripe.customer.portal` - Generate billing portal session ### Invoice Operations - `stripe.invoice.create` - Create invoice - `stripe.invoice.finalize` - Finalize draft invoice - `stripe.invoice.send` - Send invoice to customer - `stripe.invoice.pay` - Pay invoice - `stripe.invoice.void` - Void invoice - `stripe.invoice.list` - List invoices - `stripe.invoice.upcoming` - Preview upcoming invoice - `stripe.invoice.items` - Manage invoice line items ### Product & Price Operations - `stripe.product.create` - Create product - `stripe.product.update` - Update product - `stripe.product.list` - List products - `stripe.price.create` - Create price - `stripe.price.update` - Update price - `stripe.price.list` - List prices ### Reporting Operations - `stripe.balance.get` - Get account balance - `stripe.balance.transactions` - List balance transactions - `stripe.payout.list` - List payouts - `stripe.report.run` - Generate report - `stripe.report.download` - Download report file ### Checkout Operations - `stripe.checkout.session.create` - Create checkout session - `stripe.checkout.session.get` - Retrieve session - `stripe.checkout.session.expire` - Expire session ### Webhook Operations - `stripe.webhook.construct_event` - Verify and parse webhook - `stripe.webhook.endpoints` - Manage webhook endpoints ## Webhook Event Handling ``` payment_intent.succeeded -> Update payment status payment_intent.failed -> Handle failure, notify customer.subscription.* -> Sync subscription state invoice.paid -> Record payment, update access invoice.payment_failed -> Dunning flow trigger charge.dispute.created -> Alert, begin resolution customer.created/updated -> Sync customer data ``` ## Idempotency Management - Automatic idempotency key generation - Key storage and retrieval for retries - Configurable key format per operation - Retry-safe operation wrapper ## Zone Architecture (Financial Security) ``` Zone 0 (Public): Product catalog, public prices Zone 1 (Authorized): Customer payment history (own data) Zone 2 (Private): Customer PII, payment methods Zone 3 (Sensitive): API keys, webhook signing secrets Zone 4 (Financial): Transaction data, bank details (enhanced encryption) ``` ### Financial Data Handling - PCI DSS compliance considerations - No raw card numbers in logs - Tokenized payment method references - Audit trail for all financial operations - Encryption at rest for sensitive fields ## Dependencies - `fcp-core`: Base connector traits - `fcp-webhook`: Webhook signature verification - `fcp-crypto`: Enhanced encryption for Zone 4 - `fcp-audit`: Financial audit logging ## Integration Points - **Flywheel Billing**: Primary billing backend - **Flywheel Analytics**: Revenue metrics pipeline - **fcp.slack**: Payment notifications - **fcp.email**: Invoice delivery, receipts ## Implementation Notes - Use Stripe API version pinning (2023-10-16) - Implement automatic pagination for list operations - Handle Stripe rate limits (100 req/sec read, 100 write) - Support Connect for marketplace scenarios - Implement test mode detection and handling - Support expand[] for nested object retrieval - Handle currency conversion and formatting","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:12:16.890693054-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:12:16.890693054-05:00"} {"id":"flywheel_connectors-d1b","title":"fcp.microsoft365: Microsoft 365 Suite Integration Connector","description":"# FCP Microsoft 365 Suite Integration Connector ## Overview Comprehensive enterprise connector for Microsoft 365 suite, providing unified access through Microsoft Graph API. Critical for enterprise adoption with support for Outlook, OneDrive, Excel, Word, OneNote, SharePoint, and MS Planner. ## Sub-Connectors Architecture ### 1. Outlook (Email & Calendar) #### Email Operations - **Read Messages**: Inbox, folders, search - **Send Messages**: Compose, reply, forward - **Manage Messages**: Move, delete, archive - **Attachments**: Upload, download, inline - **Mail Folders**: Create, organize, rules #### Calendar Operations - **Events**: Create, update, delete, RSVP - **Calendars**: Multiple calendar support - **Availability**: Free/busy lookup - **Scheduling**: Find meeting times - **Recurring Events**: Complex patterns #### Contacts - **Contact Management**: CRUD operations - **Contact Folders**: Organization - **Contact Groups**: Distribution lists ### 2. OneDrive (File Storage) #### File Operations - **Upload**: Simple and resumable - **Download**: Direct and streaming - **Copy/Move**: Within and across drives - **Delete**: Soft delete and restore - **Sharing**: Links, permissions #### Folder Management - **Create/Delete Folders** - **List Contents**: Pagination support - **Search**: Full-text search - **Delta Sync**: Track changes #### Special Folders - Documents, Pictures, Desktop - App-specific folders - Shared folders ### 3. Excel Online #### Workbook Operations - **Open/Create Workbooks** - **List Worksheets** - **Workbook Sessions**: Persistent editing #### Data Operations ```python # Read range GET /workbook/worksheets/{id}/range(address='A1:D10') # Update range PATCH /workbook/worksheets/{id}/range(address='A1:D10') { "values": [["A", "B"], ["C", "D"]] } ``` #### Table Operations - **Create Tables**: From ranges - **Add Rows**: Append data - **Sort/Filter**: Data manipulation - **Calculated Columns**: Formulas #### Charts & Pivots - Create charts from data - Pivot table operations ### 4. Word Online #### Document Operations - **Create Documents**: From templates - **Read Content**: Full text extraction - **Update Content**: Append, replace - **Export**: PDF, other formats #### Content Controls - Find and replace - Bookmark management - Comment operations ### 5. OneNote #### Notebook Operations - **List Notebooks**: Personal and shared - **Create Notebooks** - **Sections**: Create, organize - **Section Groups**: Nested organization #### Page Operations ```python # Create page with HTML content POST /sections/{id}/pages Content-Type: text/html Page Title

Heading

Content here

``` #### Content - Rich text with HTML - Images and attachments - Ink and handwriting - Tags and to-do items ### 6. SharePoint #### Site Operations - **List Sites**: All accessible sites - **Site Details**: Properties, permissions - **Subsites**: Create, manage #### Lists & Libraries - **Document Libraries**: File storage - **Custom Lists**: Structured data - **List Items**: CRUD operations - **Views**: Custom views #### Pages & News - **Site Pages**: Create, update - **News Posts**: Publishing - **Web Parts**: Content blocks ### 7. MS Planner #### Plan Operations - **Create Plans**: Within Groups - **List Plans**: User's plans - **Plan Details**: Buckets, tasks #### Task Operations ```python { "planId": "...", "bucketId": "...", "title": "Task title", "assignments": { "user-id": { "@odata.type": "#microsoft.graph.plannerAssignment", "orderHint": " !" } }, "dueDateTime": "2024-12-31T00:00:00Z" } ``` #### Bucket Management - Create/organize buckets - Move tasks between buckets - Bucket ordering ## Microsoft Graph API (Unified Endpoint) ### Base Configuration ```yaml graph_api: base_url: "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0" beta_url: "https://graph.microsoft.com/beta" scopes: - "User.Read" - "Mail.ReadWrite" - "Files.ReadWrite.All" - "Calendars.ReadWrite" - "Sites.ReadWrite.All" - "Tasks.ReadWrite" ``` ### Batch Requests ```python POST /$batch { "requests": [ {"id": "1", "method": "GET", "url": "/me/messages"}, {"id": "2", "method": "GET", "url": "/me/events"}, {"id": "3", "method": "GET", "url": "/me/drive/root/children"} ] } ``` ## OAuth 2.0 with Refresh Tokens ### Authorization Flow ``` 1. GET /authorize?client_id=...&scope=...&redirect_uri=... 2. User consents 3. POST /token (authorization_code grant) 4. Store refresh_token securely 5. POST /token (refresh_token grant) when access_token expires ``` ### Token Management ```yaml auth: type: "oauth2" client_id: "${AZURE_CLIENT_ID}" client_secret: "${AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET}" tenant_id: "${AZURE_TENANT_ID}" redirect_uri: "http://localhost:8080/callback" token_storage: type: "encrypted_file" path: "/secure/tokens.enc" auto_refresh: true refresh_buffer_seconds: 300 ``` ### Scopes by Sub-connector | Sub-connector | Required Scopes | |---------------|-----------------| | Outlook Mail | Mail.Read, Mail.ReadWrite, Mail.Send | | Outlook Calendar | Calendars.Read, Calendars.ReadWrite | | OneDrive | Files.Read, Files.ReadWrite, Files.ReadWrite.All | | Excel | Files.ReadWrite | | Word | Files.ReadWrite | | OneNote | Notes.Read, Notes.ReadWrite | | SharePoint | Sites.Read.All, Sites.ReadWrite.All | | Planner | Tasks.Read, Tasks.ReadWrite, Group.ReadWrite.All | ## Webhook Subscriptions (Real-time Events) ### Subscription Management ```python # Create subscription POST /subscriptions { "changeType": "created,updated,deleted", "notificationUrl": "https://webhook.example.com/m365", "resource": "/me/messages", "expirationDateTime": "2024-12-31T00:00:00Z", "clientState": "secret-validation-token" } ``` ### Supported Resources - `/me/messages`: Email changes - `/me/events`: Calendar changes - `/me/contacts`: Contact changes - `/drives/{id}/root`: OneDrive changes - `/sites/{id}/lists/{id}/items`: SharePoint changes - `/groups/{id}/planner/tasks`: Planner changes ### Webhook Handler ```python async def handle_webhook(request): # Validation challenge if 'validationToken' in request.query: return PlainTextResponse(request.query['validationToken']) # Process notifications for notification in request.json()['value']: resource = notification['resource'] change_type = notification['changeType'] # Process change... ``` ### Subscription Renewal - Max lifetime: 3 days (most resources) - Auto-renewal before expiration - Webhook validation handling ## Configuration Schema ```yaml fcp.microsoft365: tenant_id: "${AZURE_TENANT_ID}" client_id: "${AZURE_CLIENT_ID}" client_secret: "${AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET}" auth: type: "oauth2" redirect_uri: "http://localhost:8080/callback" token_cache: "/secure/token_cache.json" sub_connectors: outlook: enabled: true mail_folders: ["Inbox", "Sent Items"] calendar_sync: true onedrive: enabled: true root_path: "/Documents" excel: enabled: true word: enabled: true onenote: enabled: true sharepoint: enabled: true sites: ["https://tenant.sharepoint.com/sites/team"] planner: enabled: true webhooks: enabled: true endpoint_url: "https://webhook.example.com/m365" resources: - "/me/messages" - "/me/events" rate_limits: requests_per_second: 10 concurrent_connections: 5 ``` ## MCP Tool Definitions ### Outlook Tools - `outlook_list_messages`: List emails - `outlook_send_message`: Send email - `outlook_create_event`: Create calendar event - `outlook_get_availability`: Check free/busy ### OneDrive Tools - `onedrive_list_files`: List directory contents - `onedrive_upload_file`: Upload file - `onedrive_download_file`: Download file - `onedrive_share_file`: Create sharing link ### Excel Tools - `excel_read_range`: Read cell range - `excel_write_range`: Write to cells - `excel_create_table`: Create data table - `excel_run_function`: Execute formula ### SharePoint Tools - `sharepoint_list_sites`: List sites - `sharepoint_get_list_items`: Read list data - `sharepoint_create_list_item`: Add list item ### Planner Tools - `planner_list_tasks`: List user tasks - `planner_create_task`: Create new task - `planner_update_task`: Update task status ### Webhook Tools - `m365_create_subscription`: Create webhook - `m365_list_subscriptions`: List active webhooks - `m365_delete_subscription`: Remove webhook ## Enterprise Features ### Multi-tenant Support - Per-tenant configuration - Tenant isolation - Cross-tenant operations (with consent) ### Compliance & Governance - Audit logging - Data residency awareness - eDiscovery integration ### Delegated vs Application Permissions - User context operations - Background service operations - Admin consent flows ## Error Handling - Token refresh failures - Rate limit (429) handling - Throttling with Retry-After - Permission denied errors - Resource not found ## Implementation Phases ### Phase 1: Core Auth (Week 1-2) - [ ] OAuth 2.0 flow implementation - [ ] Token storage and refresh - [ ] Multi-tenant support - [ ] Permission management ### Phase 2: Outlook (Week 3-4) - [ ] Mail operations - [ ] Calendar operations - [ ] Contact operations ### Phase 3: OneDrive & Files (Week 5-6) - [ ] File operations - [ ] Excel integration - [ ] Word integration ### Phase 4: Collaboration (Week 7-8) - [ ] SharePoint integration - [ ] OneNote integration - [ ] Planner integration ### Phase 5: Real-time (Week 9-10) - [ ] Webhook subscriptions - [ ] Change notifications - [ ] Delta sync ### Phase 6: Enterprise (Week 11-12) - [ ] Compliance features - [ ] Monitoring - [ ] Documentation ## Dependencies - msal (Microsoft Authentication Library) - httpx (async HTTP client) - cryptography (token encryption) - pydantic (data validation) ## Success Metrics - OAuth flow success rate > 99% - API call latency < 500ms - Webhook delivery success > 99.9% - Support all listed sub-connectors - Enterprise security compliance","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:12:32.282999005-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:12:32.282999005-05:00"} {"id":"flywheel_connectors-d3z","title":"fcp.reddit: Authentic User Opinions Research","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:21:23.349836558-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:21:23.349836558-05:00"} @@ -96,6 +100,7 @@ {"id":"flywheel_connectors-ptr","title":"fcp.anthropic - Anthropic AI Provider Connector","description":"# FCP Anthropic Connector - Anthropic AI Provider ## Overview A comprehensive connector for Anthropic's Claude API, enabling agents to leverage Claude models for complex reasoning, tool use, vision capabilities, and batch processing with built-in cost tracking and budget enforcement. ## Priority: P1 (Critical Infrastructure) ## Core Capabilities ### 1. Messages API - Send messages to Claude models - Streaming responses for real-time output - Multi-turn conversations - System prompts - Model selection (claude-opus-4-5-20251101, claude-sonnet-4-20250514, claude-haiku, etc.) - Temperature and sampling controls - Max tokens configuration - Stop sequences ### 2. Tool Use Support - Define tools with JSON schema - Handle tool_use responses - Execute tools and return results - Multi-tool conversations - Parallel tool execution - Tool choice forcing (auto, any, specific) ### 3. Vision Capabilities - Images in prompts (base64 or URL) - Multiple images per message - Image analysis and description - Document/screenshot understanding - Chart and diagram interpretation ### 4. Prompt Caching - Cache system prompts - Cache large context documents - Cache tool definitions - Automatic cache management - Cache hit/miss tracking - Cost savings calculation ### 5. Batch API - Submit batch requests - Track batch status - Retrieve batch results - Cancel batches - Cost-efficient bulk processing - 50% cost reduction for batch jobs ### 6. Cost Tracking & Budget Enforcement - Per-request cost calculation - Running total tracking - Budget limits per agent/session - Alerts at thresholds - Automatic cutoff at budget limit - Cost attribution and reporting ## FCP Integration ### Manifest Structure ```toml [connector] name = "fcp.anthropic" version = "0.1.0" description = "Anthropic Claude API integration with cost tracking" [capabilities] messages = { risk = "medium", description = "Send messages to Claude" } streaming = { risk = "medium", description = "Stream responses" } tool_use = { risk = "medium", description = "Use tools in conversations" } vision = { risk = "medium", description = "Process images" } batch = { risk = "low", description = "Submit batch requests" } [trust_zones] default = "z:ai:inference" [resources] rate_limit_rpm = 1000 rate_limit_tpm = 100000 default_timeout_ms = 120000 [billing] track_costs = true budget_enforcement = true ``` ### Tool Definitions ```yaml tools: - name: anthropic_message description: Send a message to Claude parameters: model: type: string enum: [claude-opus-4-5-20251101, claude-sonnet-4-20250514, claude-3-5-haiku-20241022] required: true messages: type: array items: type: object properties: role: { type: string, enum: [user, assistant] } content: { type: string } required: true system: { type: string } max_tokens: { type: integer, default: 4096 } temperature: { type: number, default: 1.0, min: 0, max: 1 } stream: { type: boolean, default: false } - name: anthropic_message_with_tools description: Send a message with tool definitions parameters: model: { type: string, required: true } messages: { type: array, required: true } tools: type: array items: type: object properties: name: { type: string } description: { type: string } input_schema: { type: object } tool_choice: type: object properties: type: { type: string, enum: [auto, any, tool] } name: { type: string } - name: anthropic_message_with_vision description: Send a message with images parameters: model: { type: string, required: true } messages: type: array items: type: object properties: role: { type: string } content: type: array items: oneOf: - type: object properties: type: { const: text } text: { type: string } - type: object properties: type: { const: image } source: type: object properties: type: { enum: [base64, url] } media_type: { type: string } data: { type: string } - name: anthropic_batch_create description: Create a batch request parameters: requests: type: array items: type: object properties: custom_id: { type: string } params: { type: object } required: true - name: anthropic_batch_status description: Get batch status parameters: batch_id: { type: string, required: true } - name: anthropic_batch_results description: Get batch results parameters: batch_id: { type: string, required: true } - name: anthropic_get_usage description: Get current usage and costs parameters: period: { type: string, enum: [session, day, month] } ``` ## Cost Tracking ### Pricing Model (as of implementation) | Model | Input (per 1M tokens) | Output (per 1M tokens) | |-------|----------------------|------------------------| | claude-opus-4-5-20251101 | $15.00 | $75.00 | | claude-sonnet-4-20250514 | $3.00 | $15.00 | | claude-3-5-haiku | $0.25 | $1.25 | ### Budget Enforcement ```rust struct BudgetConfig { max_per_request: Option, max_per_session: Option, max_per_day: Option, warning_threshold: f64, // 0.0 - 1.0 } ``` ### Cost Attribution - Track costs per agent - Track costs per task/session - Track costs per tool - Generate reports ## Prompt Caching Strategy - System prompts > 1024 tokens: Always cache - Tool definitions: Cache when > 5 tools - Large documents: Cache with TTL - Cache warming on connector init ## Error Handling - Rate limit (429): Exponential backoff - Overloaded (529): Queue and retry - Invalid request (400): Parse and report - Auth failure (401): Refresh credentials - Context length exceeded: Truncation strategy ## Dependencies - anthropic-rs or custom HTTP client - reqwest (HTTP) - tokio (async) - serde (serialization) - async-stream (streaming) ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Send basic message and receive response - [ ] Stream response tokens in real-time - [ ] Use tools in conversation - [ ] Process images in prompts - [ ] Submit and retrieve batch jobs - [ ] Track costs accurately per request - [ ] Enforce budget limits - [ ] Handle rate limits gracefully - [ ] Utilize prompt caching","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:11:55.294212353-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:11:55.294212353-05:00"} {"id":"flywheel_connectors-quo","title":"fcp.youtube - YouTube Data & Studio API Connector","description":"# fcp.youtube - YouTube Data & Studio API Connector ## Overview Full YouTube integration covering video discovery, transcript extraction, analytics, and content management for media-rich Flywheel workflows. ## Archetype **Hybrid: Request-Response + Polling** - Request-Response: Data API for search, metadata, comments - Polling: Analytics updates, processing status checks ## Key Operations ### Video Operations - `youtube.video.get` - Get video metadata by ID - `youtube.video.list` - List videos with filters - `youtube.video.search` - Search videos with query - `youtube.video.update` - Update video metadata (own videos) - `youtube.video.delete` - Delete video - `youtube.video.rate` - Like/dislike video - `youtube.video.report_abuse` - Report video ### Transcript Operations - `youtube.transcript.get` - Get video transcript - `youtube.transcript.list` - List available transcript tracks - `youtube.transcript.auto` - Get auto-generated captions - `youtube.transcript.manual` - Get manually uploaded captions - `youtube.transcript.translate` - Get translated transcript - `youtube.caption.upload` - Upload caption track - `youtube.caption.update` - Update caption track - `youtube.caption.delete` - Delete caption track ### Channel Operations - `youtube.channel.get` - Get channel by ID - `youtube.channel.list` - List channels (by username, etc.) - `youtube.channel.mine` - Get authenticated user's channel - `youtube.channel.sections` - Get channel sections - `youtube.channel.branding` - Get branding settings ### Playlist Operations - `youtube.playlist.create` - Create playlist - `youtube.playlist.update` - Update playlist metadata - `youtube.playlist.delete` - Delete playlist - `youtube.playlist.list` - List playlists - `youtube.playlist.items.list` - Get playlist videos - `youtube.playlist.items.add` - Add video to playlist - `youtube.playlist.items.remove` - Remove from playlist - `youtube.playlist.items.reorder` - Reorder playlist items ### Comment Operations - `youtube.comment.list` - List video comments - `youtube.comment.create` - Post comment - `youtube.comment.reply` - Reply to comment - `youtube.comment.update` - Edit comment - `youtube.comment.delete` - Delete comment - `youtube.comment.moderate` - Set moderation status - `youtube.comment.threads` - Get comment threads ### Analytics Operations (YouTube Analytics API) - `youtube.analytics.query` - Query analytics data - `youtube.analytics.reports` - Generate reports - `youtube.analytics.realtime` - Real-time view data - `youtube.analytics.demographics` - Audience demographics - `youtube.analytics.traffic` - Traffic sources - `youtube.analytics.engagement` - Engagement metrics ### Upload Operations (Resumable Upload) - `youtube.upload.init` - Initialize resumable upload - `youtube.upload.chunk` - Upload video chunk - `youtube.upload.status` - Check upload status - `youtube.upload.resume` - Resume interrupted upload - `youtube.upload.finalize` - Complete upload - `youtube.upload.thumbnail` - Set video thumbnail ### Live Streaming Operations - `youtube.live.broadcast.create` - Create broadcast - `youtube.live.broadcast.bind` - Bind to stream - `youtube.live.broadcast.transition` - Change broadcast state - `youtube.live.stream.create` - Create live stream - `youtube.live.chat.messages` - Get live chat messages - `youtube.live.chat.send` - Send chat message ## Quota Management YouTube API has complex quota system: - Read operations: 1-100 units - Write operations: 50-1600 units - Daily quota: 10,000 units default ### Quota Strategy - Query cost pre-calculation - Quota budget allocation per workflow - Caching layer to reduce redundant calls - Batch requests where possible - parts parameter optimization ## Zone Architecture ``` Zone 0 (Public): Public video metadata, search results Zone 1 (Authorized): User watch history, subscriptions Zone 2 (Private): Analytics data, unlisted videos Zone 3 (Sensitive): OAuth tokens, API keys ``` ## Dependencies - `fcp-core`: Base connector traits - `fcp-oauth`: Google OAuth 2.0 flow - `fcp-upload`: Resumable upload handling - `fcp-cache`: Metadata caching ## Integration Points - **Flywheel Media**: Video content indexing - **Flywheel Knowledge**: Transcript ingestion for RAG - **fcp.openai**: Transcript summarization - **fcp.whisper**: Alternative transcription ## Implementation Notes - Use YouTube Data API v3 - Implement exponential backoff for quota errors - Cache video metadata (TTL: 1 hour) - Support both API key and OAuth authentication - Handle regional restrictions gracefully - Implement proper ISO 8601 duration parsing - Support snippet, contentDetails, statistics parts -
